info.title: ChangeDB.ConsoleApp
info.description:
Copyright (C) 2026 Pengbo Yang
dumpsql      Dump database as sql scripts
importsql    import sql script to target database
migration    Migration database from source to target
help         Display more information on a specific command.
version      Display version information.

options.name: --force
options.description:
(Default: false) drop target sql script file if
exists

options.name: --dump-scope
options.description: (Default: All) (All/Metadata/Data)

options.name: --name-style
options.description: target object name style (Original/Lower/Upper).

options.name: --max-fetch-bytes
options.description:
max fetch bytes when read source database (unit
KB), default value is 10 (100KB).

options.name: --pre-sql-file
options.description:
pre sql file, execute these sql script before
the migration one-by-one.

options.name: --pre-sql-file-split
options.description:
(Default: ) pre sql file split chars, default
value is ""

options.name: --post-sql-file
options.description:
post sql file, execute these sql script after
the migration one-by-one.

options.name: --post-sql-file-split
options.description:
(Default: ) post sql file split chars, default
value is ""

options.name: --target-default-schema
options.description: target database default schema.

options.name: --optimize-insertion
options.description: (Default: true) optimize insertion script.

options.name: --hide-progress
options.description: (Default: false) hide progress bar.

options.name: --tables
options.description:
the tables to include. if empty, include all
tables.

options.name: --schemas
options.description:
the schemas to include. if empty, include all
schemas.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description:
Display version information.
source-dbtype (pos. 1)        Required. source database type.
(mysql/postgres/sqlserver/sqlce)
source-connection (pos. 2)    Required. source database connection strings
target-dbtype (pos. 3)        Required. target database type, default use
source database type.
(mysql/postgres/sqlserver/sqlce)
output-file (pos. 4)          Required. output script file

options.name: --sql-file-split
options.description:
(Default: ) sql file split chars, default value
is ""

options.name: --recreate-new
options.description: (Default: false) recreate new database

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description:
Display version information.
target-dbtype (pos. 1)        Required. target database type.
target-connection (pos. 2)    Required. target database connection strings
script-file (pos. 3)          Required. the script file path

options.name: --force
options.description: drop target database if exists

options.name: --migration-scope
options.description: (Default: All) (All/Metadata/Data)

options.name: --name-style
options.description: target object name style (Original/Lower/Upper).

options.name: --max-fetch-bytes
options.description:
max fetch bytes when read source database (unit
KB), default value is 100 (100KB).

options.name: --pre-sql-file
options.description:
pre sql file, execute these sql script before
the migration one-by-one.

options.name: --pre-sql-file-split
options.description:
(Default: ) pre sql file split chars, default
value is ""

options.name: --post-sql-file
options.description:
post sql file, execute these sql script after
the migration one-by-one.

options.name: --post-sql-file-split
options.description:
(Default: ) sql file split chars, default value
is ""

options.name: --target-default-schema
options.description: target database default schema.

options.name: --hide-progress
options.description: (Default: false) hide progress bar.

options.name: --tables
options.description:
the tables to include. if empty, include all
tables.

options.name: --schemas
options.description:
the schemas to include. if empty, include all
schemas.

options.name: --create-target-database
options.description:
(Default: New) the behavior of how to create
target database (New/ForceNew/Never).

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description:
Display version information.
source-dbtype (pos. 1)        Required. source database
type.(mysql/postgres/sqlserver/sqlce)
source-connection (pos. 2)    Required. source database connection strings
target-dbtype (pos. 3)        Required. target database
type.(mysql/postgres/sqlserver/sqlce)
target-connection (pos. 4)    Required. target database connection strings
